column2: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your email.
Use the 'Forgot password' option on the login page to receive a reset link.
Log into your account and open the Orders section to track your shipment.
Refunds are available within 30 days of delivery.
Items can be returned within 30 days if unused.
Delivery usually takes 5 to 7 business days.
Verify your card details or try another payment method.
Email support@angularbazaar.com or use the chat support.
Orders may be cancelled within 24 hours.
Products may be exchanged within 30 days.
